verdict_detail: Refuse the bundled authorization. Constrain disaggregated components: reversible interventions authorized separately; partially-reversible require protocol specification; irreversible refused pending independent risk assessment. Mandate parallel comparable-alternative funding at matched scale.
confidence: High on refusal of bundle-as-structured; medium-high on parallel-comparable-funding mandate; medium on track-boundary definitions.
unresolved_uncertainty_sources: Whether the proposer is structurally positioned to act in good faith on disaggregated authorization.
Whether comparable-alternative funding will be allocated at matched scale by the same authority.
Whether intergenerational outcomes can be predicted on policy-cycle timescales.
